decisions.description: Upgrade Cedar Health to the 30-seat tier with the advanced permissions module
Target signing the renewal before the current contract expires

action_items.description: Send an updated renewal quote for the 30-seat tier including the permissions module
Run the quote by the procurement team before signing
Have the onboarding team reach out to set up SSO

key_facts: Role-based access is required because they handle sensitive patient data
The new tier requires enabling SSO
